steps.title: Undo the outside multiplier
steps.content:
Start with $4\sqrt{2x}=16$. Divide both sides by $4$:
$$\sqrt{2x}=4$$

steps.title: Compute the requested value
steps.content:
The question asks for $6x$, so use $x=8$:
$$6x=6(8)=48$$

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: $48$ matches choice B. The question asks for $6x$, not for $x$ itself, so stopping at $x=8$ would be one step short.
